subject: Benoit Guina
title: Software Developer
bio: Passionate Android developer with expertise, I stay updated on technical stacks that allow me to adapt to various needs with great versatility.
I am available for a mission that allows me to contribute to Kotlin Multiplatform projects, Compose Multiplatform, and potentially test my skills in iOS and backend Kotlin.

experiences.title: Android Developer
experiences.subtitle: Freelancer for Louis Vuitton
experiences.intro: Reinforcement to the LV Connect team for the release of new connected objects (4 Android devs).
tasks: Assistance in task estimation and backlog management
Implementation of numerous Bluetooth functionalities and interactions
Administration of deployments on Google Play and Huawei App Gallery
Monitoring and maintenance of versions in production
Documentation and knowledge transfer.
experiences.technical_stack: Kotlin CLEAN+MVVM, RX2, LiveData, Retrofit, OkHttp, Room, Hilt, Jetpack, BLE, GMS / HMS, Bitrise, Sonar
